IAuthenticatorCache Methods

One Identity Manager API Server

The IAuthenticatorCache type exposes the following members.

Methods
  NameDescription
GetAuthentifierConfigurationAsync
Returns configuration data for the specified authentication module.
GetUiAuthentifiersAsync
Returns the list of authentication modules available for the user interface.
GetWebAppConfigAsync
Returns configuration data for the current application.
TryGetAuthModuleInfoAsync
Returns the extended authentication module info for the specified module.
Top
Extension Methods
  NameDescription
GetEffectiveAllowedModulesAsync (Defined by AuthenticatorCacheExtensions.)
